verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are all I want You are all I need You are all my soul longs for You satisfy me You are all I want You are all I need You are all my soul longs for You satisfy me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My heart and flesh cry out For you the living God You are the yearning of my soul For were else can I go You and you alone Fulfill my, heart my, life my all You are all I want You are all I need You are all my soul longs for You satisfy me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My heart and flesh cry out For you the living God You are the yearning of my soul Lord, were else can I go You and you alone Fulfill my heart, my life, my all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are all I want You are all I need You are all my soul longs for You satisfy me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My deepest desire Is met in your eyes My soul waits for you God I search the world over And still I find Only you satisfy My soul waits for you God I search the world over And still I find Only you satisfy
